generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired teacher who values order and responsibility, I'm deeply concerned about our nation's strategic autonomy. Foreign adversaries are exploiting our civil liberties to undermine our security. We can't afford to be naive anymore. Supporting strong, independent defense isn't just about military strength - it's about protecting the values we've built our lives around. Our allies aren't pulling their weight, and our preparedness is at risk. We owe it to future generations to act now. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
